final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: illustration
Asset type: fine art painting, traditional Chinese aesthetic
Primary request: a classical Chinese beauty in exquisite hanfu seated on a wooden pavilion in Jiangnan water town, holding a round silk fan, looking back into the distance
Scene/backdrop: traditional Jiangnan water town with white-walled black-tiled Hui-style architecture, winding bluestone paths, lotus pond in full bloom, white egrets flying low over water
Subject: elegant classical beauty in light cyan hanfu with golden embroidery, intricate updo adorned with jade hairpins and pearl ornaments, delicate refined makeup, holding round fan, seated on wooden pavilion
Style/medium: fusion of gongbi (meticulous brushwork) and xieyi (freehand) Chinese painting techniques, traditional East Asian ink wash aesthetic
Composition/framing: symmetrical composition, medium shot with figure as focal point, pavilion and lotus pond framing the scene
Lighting/mood: soft diffused natural daylight, gentle breeze atmosphere, poetic and serene mood
Color palette: soft cyan, pale gold, lotus pink, white, ink black, jade green, muted earth tones
Materials/textures: silk fabric with embroidered patterns, polished wood pavilion, lotus petals with dewdrops, glazed roof tiles, smooth jade and pearls
Constraints: maintain symmetrical composition, preserve delicate gongbi-style details on costume and accessories, keep the poetic Jiangnan atmosphere
Avoid: photorealistic rendering, 3D plastic look, oversaturated colors, Western-style perspective, modern elements, watermark
